{"query":"JD Vice President Trump delegation 2026 Winter Olympics Milan statement February 2026","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1828,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.presidency.ucsb.edu/documents/white-house-press-release-president-donald-j-trump-announces-presidential-delegation-milan","title":"White House Press Release - President Donald J. Trump Announces Presidential Delegation to Milan, Italy to Attend the Opening Ceremony of the 2026 Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina | The American Pr","content":"Trump Announces Presidential Delegation to Milan, Italy to Attend the Opening Ceremony of the 2026 Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina"},{"url":"https://www.pbs.org/newshour/world/vance-says-the-olympics-are-one-of-the-few-things-that-unite-americans","title":"Vance says the Olympics are 'one of the few things' that unite Americans | PBS News","content":"MILAN (AP) — Vice President JD Vance arrived in Milan with his family Thursday, telling U.S. athletes competing in the Milan Cortina Winter Games that the competition "is one of the few things that unites the entire country."
He is leading President Donald Trump's delegation to the 2026 Winter Olympics and later stopping in Armenia and Azerbaijan in a show of support for a peace agreement brokered by the White House last year.
At the opening ceremony for the games on Friday, the vice president will lead a U.S. delegation that includes his wife, second lady Usha Vance, Secretary of State Marco Rubio and U.S.
Former Olympic gold medalists will also be in the delegation, including hockey player sisters Jocelyne Lamoureux-Davidson and Monique Lamoureux-Morando; speedskater Apolo Ohno and figure skater Evan Lysacek."},{"url":"https://apnews.com/article/us-delegation-winter-olympics-vance-rubio-italy-4cda5924bd4bec7732c065e2a170cbaf","title":"Vance and Rubio set to attend Winter Olympics opening ceremony in Italy. Trump isn't on the list | AP News","content":"Vice President JD Vance will lead an American delegation to the 2026 Winter Olympics in Italy and attend the opening ceremony, the White House said Saturday.
Ambassador Tilman Fertitta and a group of Olympic gold medalists, the White House said in a statement.
The athletes in the Olympic delegation include Jocelyne Lamoureux-Davidson and Monique Lamoureux-Morando, twin sisters who were members of the ice hockey team that won in 2018.
Figure skater Evan Lysacek and Apolo Ohno, who won gold twice in short track speed skating, will also join."},{"url":"https://www.politico.com/news/2026/02/05/trump-geopolitics-winter-olympics-00766982","title":"Trump’s geopolitical tensions spill into the Winter Olympics - POLITICO","content":"President Donald Trump won’t be representing the U.S. at the opening ceremony of the Italian Olympic Games in Milan’s famous San Siro Stadium.
The Trump administration has big plans for these Olympics, according to a State Department memo viewed by POLITICO.
Trump has also sparred with Emmanuel Macron, the president of France (the 13th-place finisher in Beijing), and threatened a military incursion in pushing Denmark (a Scandinavian country which curiously hasn’t medaled in the Winter Olympics since 1998) to cede Greenland.
All while seeming to placate Russia, whose athletes competed under a neutral flag in 2022 due to doping sanctions and secured the second-most medals in the Beijing games, which ended just days before President Vladimir Putin invaded Ukraine.
A State Department spokesperson also highlighted the role that its Diplomatic Security Service would serve as the security lead for Americans throughout Olympic and Paralympic competition."}]}

Trump Announces Presidential Delegation to Milan, Italy to Attend the Opening Ceremony of the 2026 Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina. Trump** announced the designation of a Presidential Delegation to Milan, Italy to attend the Opening Ceremony of the Olympic Winter Games, on February 6, 2026. The Honorable **JD Vance**, **Vice President of the United States**, and **Usha Vance, Second Lady of the United States**, will lead the delegation. The Honorable **Marco Rubio**, Secretary of State of the United States. The Honorable **Tilman Feritta**, Ambassador of the United States to the Italian Republic. **Mrs. Jocelyne Lamoureux-Davidson**, 2018 Winter Olympics American Gold Medalist, Women's Ice Hockey. **Mrs. Monique Lamoureux-Morando**, 2018 Winter Olympics American Gold Medalist, Women's Ice Hockey. Trump (2nd Term), White House Press Release - President Donald J. Trump Announces Presidential Delegation to Milan, Italy to Attend the Opening Ceremony of the 2026 Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina Online by Gerhard Peters and John T.","score":0.885404,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.theguardian.com/sport/2026/jan/17/jd-vance-us-delegation-milan-cortina-winter-olympics","title":"JD Vance to lead US presidential delegation at Milano Cortina Winter Olympics | Winter Olympics 2026 | The Guardian","content":"JD Vance will be accompanied by second lady Usha Vance at the opening ceremony of the 2026 Winter Olympics. # JD Vance to lead US presidential delegation at Milano Cortina Winter Olympics. * Vance to represent US at Olympic opening ceremony. US vice-president JD Vance will head the American presidential delegation to the opening ceremony of the 2026 Winter Olympics in Italy, the White House confirmed Saturday. Vance is scheduled to attend the ceremony on 6 February, when the Milano Cortina Games officially get underway. While the main event will take place at Milan’s San Siro stadium, which is expected to host tens of thousands of spectators, the traditional Parade of Nations will also be staged simultaneously at three mountain venues – Cortina d’Ampezzo, Predazzo and Livigno – marking the first time Olympic athletes have been introduced across multiple locations. US president Donald Trump will not attend the opening ceremony and is not listed as part of the delegation, according to the White House.","score":0.8361405,"raw_content":null},{"url":"https://www.facebook.com/euronews/posts/the-us-vice-president-leads-the-us-delegation-at-the-milan-cortina-2026-winter-o/1274837338024927","title":"The US vice president leads the US delegation at the Milan ...","content":"JUST IN: President Trump is deploying VP JD VANCE and Sec.
